Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Mediation And For Related Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Continued To Apr-10-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER NICOLAS SOMMER Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Mediation And For Related Attorneys Fees

is continued to April 10, 2026 for the moving party to file a supplemental brief citing authorities re: petition to compel mediation under CCP 1281.2. Brief shall not cite any authorities regarding petitions and motions to compel arbitration. Brief shall be limited to two pages. If no authorities are located, the brief shall state "none."

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Mediation And For Related Attorneys Fees

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER NICOLAS SOMMER Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Mediation And For Related Attorneys Fees is continued to March 11, 2026 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than February 20, 2026 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.
